name: prompt-library
description: A comprehensive library of AI prompts for developers and professionals

scripts.check-ports: node -e "const net = require('net'); [3000,8000,8080,3001,5000].forEach(p => { const s = net.createServer().listen(p, () => { console.log(`Port ${p}: ✅ Available`); s.close(); }).on('error', () => console.log(`Port ${p}: ❌ In use`)); })"

author: Prompt Library Contributors
